[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2014-06-13
[TITLE]: Picture: Horse kept on balcony so it is not stolen by thieves - The Mirror
[METADATA/INTRO]: Picture: Horse kept on balcony so it is not stolen by thieves Borys Kozlowski traipsed the stallion through his flat and out onto the terrace because he was worried that the animal would be stolen...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Picture: Horse kept on balcony so it is not stolen by thieves 
 Borys Kozlowski traipsed the stallion through his flat and out onto the terrace because he was worried that the animal would be stolen 
 This horse ended up spending the afternoon on a balcony after a man determined it was the safest place to be. 
 Wacky Borys Kozlowski had borrowed the stallion, called Dolina, from a friend and was worried that he would be targeted by thieves if not stored properly. 
 The 48-year-old from Grajewo, Poland then made the conscious decision to keep the animal on the elevated terrace until his owner returned.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Well-being instead of locked away - Where horse keeping heads | spoga horse
[METADATA/INTRO]: Well-being instead of locked away - Where is horse keeping headed? Horses have been close to people for centuries - we uphold such close relations with only very few other species. We carry out behavioural research and are gaining more...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Nice services like the solar-powered hacking out gate by Axel F Zaunbau are welcome treats which sweeten up the equestrian sport experience even more. Tangible improvements are also forthcoming in the fence and paddock segment too: The plastic-coated electric fence is replacing the classic tapes, what's more a ban on creosote-impregnated posts is also imminent. Namely, environmental and animal protection are both coming more and more under focus. 
 Stabled horses: Let there be light! 
 Nevertheless, the general rule "the more expensive a horse is, the less it gets turned out," as Florian Steer, Department Head at Haas Fertigbau put it, still applies in the dressage and show jumping circles. Thoroughbreds are classically stable-kept in Germany, although regarding the well-being of the animals this has improved greatly compared to twenty years ago (daylight and fresh air are indeed the minimum standard). Bright, cheerful facilities, good ventilation, a window and visual contact with their own species should be the rule for stabled horses too.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2021-10-06
[TITLE]: How to store a bicycle in winter? - RTR BIKES
[METADATA/INTRO]: Innhold - What will you learn from this post?...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Why is storing a bicycle in an apartment the best solution? 
 For obvious reasons, the apartment meets each of the conditions mentioned above: it is covered, dry and the temperature is optimal. However, instead of focusing on the positive aspects of storing a bicycle in winter on the premises, it is worth pointing out the drawbacks of the other solutions. 
 - Bicycle on the balcony – this is a common mistake, but it is difficult to say whether it is due to ignorance or lack of other ideas. Storing a bicycle on a balcony in winter leads to corrosion of steel components (including bearings in the bottom bracket, suspension frames or rudders), as well as color fading when exposed to the sun. Don’t tell yourself that a frame made of aluminum or carbon will be able to protect the entire bike from adverse weather conditions. Keeping a bicycle on a balcony also carries a huge risk of two-wheeled theft. For skilled thieves, the height of 4-5 is no obstacle. floors, not to mention the lower ones. So you may find that when winter is over, you won’t have anything to ride on. It’s probably not worth the risk, right?
